name: Smokehouse Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into small cubes, approximately 3/8 inch in size.
2. Brown the meat, onions, bell pepper, and garlic in a heavy skillet.
3. Pour the beer into a large pot and bring to a slow boil.
4. Boil for 10 minutes, then add the tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes, meat and onion/pepper mixture, jalapenos, barbecue sauce, and liquid smoke.
5. Reduce heat to medium and cook for half an hour, stirring every few minutes.
6. Add 2 tablespoons of cumin, salt, black pepper, and Tabasco sauce; continue cooking for another half hour.
7. Stir in the tomato paste, masa harina, and cook for 15 minutes.
8. Add the remaining cumin and cook for 10 more minutes.
